task_completion.description: Navigate to the Wikipedia page for Internet censorship.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Internet_censorship' and the Wikipedia page content is visible.

task_completion.description: Enable Reader View in the browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The webpage is displayed in a simplified Reader View layout, and the Reader View icon in the address bar is active or Reader controls are visible.

task_completion.description: Set the Reader View font to Serif.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The article text is rendered in a Serif font (letters have 'tails' or 'feet'), and/or the Reader View settings menu is open showing 'Serif' selected.

task_completion.description: Set the Reader View theme to Dark.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The webpage background is dark/black with light/white text, and/or the Reader View settings menu is open showing the 'Dark' theme selected.
The browser's print or export dialog is open with the destination set to 'Save to PDF' or 'Print to File'.

task_completion.description: Save the exported PDF to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog shows the file name 'accessible_article.pdf' being saved in the 'Documents' directory (/home/ga/Documents/), or a file manager/terminal later shows the file exists at this exact path.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical web browser to navigate and configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual web browser GUI open with the page loaded and settings menus interacted with, rather than terminal commands editing configuration files.

integrity.description: The agent used the browser's built-in print/export functionality to create the PDF.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's print dialog or save dialog is visible, rather than the agent using terminal commands like `touch` to create a fake file.

integrity.description: The agent did not type the expected output path or URL into a text editor to spoof the verification.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL and file paths appear in their proper UI elements (browser address bar, file save dialog) and not in a standalone text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Internet_censorship. Expected PDF Path: /home/ga/Documents/accessible_article.pdf. Expected Theme: dark. Expected Font: serif.
